channel.title: Projects on Vighnesh Nilajakar
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: Grocery Shop Management System
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction Grocery Shop Management System is a Software made to ease the management of a Grocery Shop and assists in keeping logs of Products, Customers, Inventory, and Bills. This Software can run on most CPUs, Its deployment is easy, and the UI is CLI based. Programs used It uses Python for Menu, Data Input, and to print the Output of the Data, and MySQL is used to store the Data entered.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: SUPER STEVE
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction Super Steve is a Minecraft Parody, which I made after watching the CS50 Lecture. Programs Used It is made out of Scratch, Which is developed by MIT and is a Simple-UI based Language, Programming is done by code-blocks. People have made some Awesome Projects, I recommend checking them out.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar
